summary: Iteration 102: Role & Permission System - Full E2E testing complete. 36/36 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully tested. Fixed 2 bugs during testing: (1) Missing User/LogOut icons import in DashboardLayout, (2) Missing role field in UserResponse model. All 6 Team API endpoints working. Sidebar filters correctly based on role. Team tab only visible for admin.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: ReferenceError: User is not defined - Missing User and LogOut icon imports from lucide-react
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added User, LogOut to the import statement

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: UserResponse model missing role field - /api/auth/me endpoint not returning user's role
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added role: Optional[str] = 'admin' to UserResponse model

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 Team API endpoints working correctly: GET /members, POST /invite, PUT /members/{id}/role, DELETE /members/{id}, DELETE /invites/{id}, GET /my-role
Permission checks working - non-admin users get 403 on management endpoints
Sidebar navigation correctly filters based on user role (officina sees only Dashboard + Produzione)
Team tab only visible for admin users in Settings page
Role badge visible in user menu for non-admin users
ROLE_PERMISSIONS mapping correctly limits access: officina sees operativo group only, guest sees nothing
test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test users with admin/officina roles
seed_data_creation: None - test data cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role & Permission system fully implemented. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration102_team.py covers all team endpoints. Settings > Team tab visible only for admin. Sidebar nav filters based on user.role. The 5 roles are: admin, ufficio_tecnico, officina, amministrazione, guest.

test_classes: TestMyRole (7 tests) - role, label, permissions for admin/non-admin
TestListMembers (6 tests) - members array, invites array, roles dict
TestInviteMember (6 tests) - invite creation, validation, 403 for non-admin
TestUpdateMemberRole (5 tests) - role update, validation, self-update blocked
TestRevokeInvite (4 tests) - revoke invite, 404 for nonexistent
TestRemoveMember (3 tests) - remove member, self-remove blocked
TestRolePermissions (2 tests) - admin has '*', 5 valid roles exist

tests_executed.results: PASS - All UI elements and flows verified
verified: Settings page has 9 tabs for admin (including Team)
Settings page has 8 tabs for non-admin (Team hidden)
Team tab shows: Gestione Team header, invite form, role descriptions, members list
Invite form has: email input, name input, role selector (4 roles), invite button
Members list shows: user avatar, name, email, role badge/selector, delete button
Non-admin users have role selector dropdown
Sidebar filters correctly for officina role (only Dashboard + Produzione visible)
Role badge visible in user menu for non-admin users

features_verified: GET /api/team/members - Returns members array, invites array, and roles dict
POST /api/team/invite - Admin can invite with email, name, role; non-admin gets 403
PUT /api/team/members/{id}/role - Admin can change roles; self-change blocked; non-admin 403
DELETE /api/team/members/{id} - Admin can remove members; self-remove blocked; non-admin 403
DELETE /api/team/invites/{id} - Admin can revoke invites; non-admin 403
GET /api/team/my-role - Returns role, label, and permissions array
Frontend Team tab visibility controlled by user.role === 'admin'
Sidebar navigation filters NAV_GROUPS based on user role
